option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.chart.LineChart?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.NumberAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<StackPane maxHeight="Infinity" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="960.0" prefWidth="1480.0" styleClass="page-root dashboard-root" stylesheets="@auth-theme.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="userauth.gui.fxml.BidderDashboardViewController"> <children> <HBox maxHeight="Infinity" maxWidth="Infinity" spacing="20.0" styleClass="shell-frame"> <children> <VBox minWidth="248.0" prefWidth="248.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="sidebar-surface"> <children> <VBox spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-brand-title" text="AUCTION HOUSE" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-nav-title" text="MODULES" /> <Label maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-nav-item sidebar-nav-item-active" text="Live Auctions" /> <Label maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-nav-item" text="Bid History" /> </children> </VBox> <Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> <VBox spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-nav-title" text="USER SESSION" /> <Label fx:id="lblSidebarUser" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-foot-title" text="Bidder" textOverrun="ELLIPSIS" /> <Button minWidth="138.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTopUp" styleClass="button ghost-button" text="TOP UP WALLET" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="18.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="topbar-surface"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="topbar-title" text="Bidder Dashboard" /> <Label styleClass="topbar-subtitle" text="Search auctions, inspect details, and place bids quickly." wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox minWidth="240.0" prefWidth="260.0" spacing="2.0" styleClass="user-pill bidder-user-pill"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblUserName" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="user-name" text="Bidder" textOverrun="ELLIPSIS" /> <Label styleClass="user-role" text="Role: BIDDER" /> </children> </VBox> <MenuButton mnemonicParsing="false" styleClass="button settings-menu-button" text="SETTINGS"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSwitchToEnglish" text="English" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSwitchToVietnamese" text="Vietnamese" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleLogout" text="LOG OUT" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChangePassword" text="Change password" /> </items> </MenuButton> </children> </HBox> <FlowPane hgap="12.0" prefWrapLength="980.0" vgap="12.0"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" minWidth="340.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="search-box bidder-toolbar-search"> <children> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="SEARCH" /> <TextField fx:id="txtSearch" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="360.0" promptText="Search by product name or category" styleClass="search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </children> </HBox> <VBox prefWidth="220.0" spacing="4.0" styleClass="bidder-filter-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="STATUS FILTER" /> <ComboBox fx:id="cbStatusFilter" prefWidth="220.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </FlowPane> </children> </VBox> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" pannable="true" styleClass="dashboard-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <VBox spacing="20.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="hero-banner hero-banner-dark"> <children> <Label styleClass="dashboard-eyebrow" text="LIVE BIDDING FLOOR" /> <Label styleClass="dashboard-title" text="Bidder Workspace" wrapText="true" /> <Label styleClass="dashboard-copy" text="Track auctions, review live details, and bid without switching screens." wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <HBox spacing="14.0"> <children> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="RUNNING AUCTIONS" /> <Label fx:id="lblRunningCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="ENDING SOON" /> <Label fx:id="lblEndingSoonCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="YOU ARE LEADING" /> <Label fx:id="lblLeadingCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="TOP_LEFT" spacing="18.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="18.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="AUCTION LIST" /> </children> </VBox> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="900.0" vgap="10.0"> <children> <Button minWidth="138.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowHistory" styleClass="button ghost-button" text="BID HISTORY" /> </children> </FlowPane> </children> </VBox> <TableView fx:id="tableAuctions" prefHeight="430.0" stylesheets="@style.css" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colId" prefWidth="70.0" text="ID" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colName" prefWidth="240.0" text="Item" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colCategory" prefWidth="170.0" text="Category" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colHighestBid" prefWidth="160.0" text="Highest Bid" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatus" prefWidth="140.0" text="Status" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colTimeLeft" prefWidth="190.0" text="Remaining" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card chart-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="PRICE OVER TIME" /> <LineChart fx:id="chartBidTrend" animated="true" createSymbols="true" legendVisible="false" prefHeight="260.0"> <xAxis> <NumberAxis forceZeroInRange="false" label="Bid count" fx:id="xAxisBidTrend" /> </xAxis> <yAxis> <NumberAxis fx:id="yAxisBidTrend" forceZeroInRange="false" label="Price" /> </yAxis> </LineChart> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="Autobids List" /> </children> </VBox> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="900.0" vgap="10.0" /> </children> </VBox> <TableView fx:id="tableAutoBid" prefHeight="430.0" stylesheets="@style.css" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colIdAB" prefWidth="70.0" text="ID" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colItemAB" prefWidth="240.0" text="Item" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colMaxPriceAB" prefWidth="170.0" text="Max price" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colIncrementAB" prefWidth="190.0" text="Increment" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox minWidth="390.0" prefWidth="420.0" spacing="16.0" styleClass="bidder-side-column"> <children> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="detail-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-kicker" text="AUCTION DETAIL" /> <StackPane maxWidth="Infinity" minHeight="220.0" prefHeight="220.0" styleClass="auction-image-panel detail-image-frame"> <children> <ImageView fx:id="imgDetailAuction" fitHeight="220.0" fitWidth="376.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" smooth="true" styleClass="auction-product-image" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailImageInitial" styleClass="auction-image-initial detail-image-initial" text="A" /> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="lblDetailName" styleClass="detail-product-name" text="Select an auction to view details" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailDescription" styleClass="body-text" text="The product description will appear here." wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailCurrentBid" styleClass="detail-price" text="0" /> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="360.0" vgap="10.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblDetailState" styleClass="status-chip status-chip-neutral" text="Status" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailTimeLeft" styleClass="status-chip status-chip-live" text="Remaining: -" /> </children> </FlowPane> <HBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="STARTING PRICE" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailStartPrice" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="LEADING BIDDER" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailLeader" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="SCHEDULE" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailSchedule" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="CATEGORY" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailCategory" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="detail-card quick-bid-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="QUICK BID" /> <TextField fx:id="txtBidAmount" onAction="#handlePlaceBid" promptText="Example: 1500000" /> <Label fx:id="lblBidStatus" styleClass="secondary-text" text="Bid status information will appear here." wrapText="true" /> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePlaceBid" styleClass="button primary-button" text="PLACE BID NOW" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card chart-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="Auto Bidding (Current auction)" /> <TextField fx:id="idAutobid" promptText="Enter id (Leave blank if want to create autobid)" /> <TextField fx:id="maxPrice" promptText="Enter max price" /> <TextField fx:id="incrementAutobid" promptText="Enter increment (Leave blank if want to delete autobid)" /> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleAutobid" prefHeight="42.0" prefWidth="645.0" styleClass="button primary-button" text="Update/Create autobid" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="LIVE BID FEED" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="lblLiveBidCount" styleClass="secondary-text" text="0 transactions" /> </children> </HBox> <VBox fx:id="bidsLiveContainer" spacing="10.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.chart.LineChart?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.NumberAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<StackPane maxHeight="Infinity" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="960.0" prefWidth="1480.0" styleClass="page-root dashboard-root" stylesheets="@auth-theme.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="userauth.gui.fxml.BidderDashboardViewController"> <children> <HBox maxHeight="Infinity" maxWidth="Infinity" spacing="20.0" styleClass="shell-frame"> <children> <VBox minWidth="248.0" prefWidth="248.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="sidebar-surface"> <children> <VBox spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-brand-title" text="AUCTION HOUSE" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-nav-title" text="MODULES" /> <Label maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-nav-item sidebar-nav-item-active" text="Live Auctions" /> <Label maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-nav-item" text="Bid History" /> </children> </VBox> <Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> <VBox spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="sidebar-nav-title" text="USER SESSION" /> <Label fx:id="lblSidebarUser" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-foot-title" text="Bidder" textOverrun="ELLIPSIS" /> <Label fx:id="lblWalletBalance" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="sidebar-foot-subtitle" text="Balance: 0 VNĐ" /> <Button minWidth="138.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTopUp" styleClass="button ghost-button" text="TOP UP WALLET" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="18.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="topbar-surface"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="topbar-title" text="Bidder Dashboard" /> <Label styleClass="topbar-subtitle" text="Search auctions, inspect details, and place bids quickly." wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox minWidth="240.0" prefWidth="260.0" spacing="2.0" styleClass="user-pill bidder-user-pill"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblUserName" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="user-name" text="Bidder" textOverrun="ELLIPSIS" /> <Label styleClass="user-role" text="Role: BIDDER" /> </children> </VBox> <MenuButton mnemonicParsing="false" styleClass="button settings-menu-button" text="SETTINGS"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSwitchToEnglish" text="English" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSwitchToVietnamese" text="Vietnamese" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleLogout" text="LOG OUT" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChangePassword" text="Change password" /> </items> </MenuButton> </children> </HBox> <FlowPane hgap="12.0" prefWrapLength="980.0" vgap="12.0"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" minWidth="340.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="search-box bidder-toolbar-search"> <children> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="SEARCH" /> <TextField fx:id="txtSearch" maxWidth="Infinity" prefWidth="360.0" promptText="Search by product name or category" styleClass="search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </children> </HBox> <VBox prefWidth="220.0" spacing="4.0" styleClass="bidder-filter-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="STATUS FILTER" /> <ComboBox fx:id="cbStatusFilter" prefWidth="220.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </FlowPane> </children> </VBox> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" pannable="true" styleClass="dashboard-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <VBox spacing="20.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="hero-banner hero-banner-dark"> <children> <Label styleClass="dashboard-eyebrow" text="LIVE BIDDING FLOOR" /> <Label styleClass="dashboard-title" text="Bidder Workspace" wrapText="true" /> <Label styleClass="dashboard-copy" text="Track auctions, review live details, and bid without switching screens." wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <HBox spacing="14.0"> <children> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="RUNNING AUCTIONS" /> <Label fx:id="lblRunningCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="ENDING SOON" /> <Label fx:id="lblEndingSoonCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox prefWidth="0.0" spacing="8.0" styleClass="metric-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="metric-label" text="YOU ARE LEADING" /> <Label fx:id="lblLeadingCount" styleClass="metric-value" text="0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="TOP_LEFT" spacing="18.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="18.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="AUCTION LIST" /> </children> </VBox> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="900.0" vgap="10.0"> <children> <Button minWidth="138.0" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleShowHistory" styleClass="button ghost-button" text="BID HISTORY" /> </children> </FlowPane> </children> </VBox> <TableView fx:id="tableAuctions" prefHeight="430.0" stylesheets="@style.css" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colId" prefWidth="70.0" text="ID" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colName" prefWidth="240.0" text="Item" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colCategory" prefWidth="170.0" text="Category" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colHighestBid" prefWidth="160.0" text="Highest Bid" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatus" prefWidth="140.0" text="Status" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colTimeLeft" prefWidth="190.0" text="Remaining" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card chart-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="PRICE OVER TIME" /> <LineChart fx:id="chartBidTrend" animated="true" createSymbols="true" legendVisible="false" prefHeight="260.0"> <xAxis> <NumberAxis forceZeroInRange="false" label="Bid count" fx:id="xAxisBidTrend" /> </xAxis> <yAxis> <NumberAxis fx:id="yAxisBidTrend" forceZeroInRange="false" label="Price" /> </yAxis> </LineChart> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <VBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="Autobids List" /> </children> </VBox> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="900.0" vgap="10.0" /> </children> </VBox> <TableView fx:id="tableAutoBid" prefHeight="430.0" stylesheets="@style.css" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colIdAB" prefWidth="70.0" text="ID" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colItemAB" prefWidth="240.0" text="Item" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colMaxPriceAB" prefWidth="170.0" text="Max price" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colIncrementAB" prefWidth="190.0" text="Increment" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox minWidth="390.0" prefWidth="420.0" spacing="16.0" styleClass="bidder-side-column"> <children> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="detail-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-kicker" text="AUCTION DETAIL" /> <StackPane maxWidth="Infinity" minHeight="220.0" prefHeight="220.0" styleClass="auction-image-panel detail-image-frame"> <children> <ImageView fx:id="imgDetailAuction" fitHeight="220.0" fitWidth="376.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" smooth="true" styleClass="auction-product-image" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailImageInitial" styleClass="auction-image-initial detail-image-initial" text="A" /> </children> </StackPane> <Label fx:id="lblDetailName" styleClass="detail-product-name" text="Select an auction to view details" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailDescription" styleClass="body-text" text="The product description will appear here." wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailCurrentBid" styleClass="detail-price" text="0" /> <FlowPane hgap="10.0" prefWrapLength="360.0" vgap="10.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblDetailState" styleClass="status-chip status-chip-neutral" text="Status" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailTimeLeft" styleClass="status-chip status-chip-live" text="Remaining: -" /> </children> </FlowPane> <HBox spacing="12.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="STARTING PRICE" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailStartPrice" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="LEADING BIDDER" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailLeader" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="SCHEDULE" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailSchedule" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4.0" styleClass="detail-meta-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="detail-meta-label" text="CATEGORY" /> <Label fx:id="lblDetailCategory" styleClass="detail-meta-value" text="-" wrapText="true" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="detail-card quick-bid-box"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="QUICK BID" /> <TextField fx:id="txtBidAmount" onAction="#handlePlaceBid" promptText="Example: 1500000" /> <Label fx:id="lblBidStatus" styleClass="secondary-text" text="Bid status information will appear here." wrapText="true" /> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePlaceBid" styleClass="button primary-button" text="PLACE BID NOW" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card chart-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="Auto Bidding (Current auction)" /> <TextField fx:id="idAutobid" promptText="Enter id (Leave blank if want to create autobid)" /> <TextField fx:id="maxPrice" promptText="Enter max price" /> <TextField fx:id="incrementAutobid" promptText="Enter increment (Leave blank if want to delete autobid)" /> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleAutobid" prefHeight="42.0" prefWidth="645.0" styleClass="button primary-button" text="Update/Create autobid" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="panel-card"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="panel-title" text="LIVE BID FEED" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="lblLiveBidCount" styleClass="secondary-text" text="0 transactions" /> </children> </HBox> <VBox fx:id="bidsLiveContainer" spacing="10.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </StackPane>
